title: Turnover Prediction
summary: Analyzed outcomes of a problem-solving training initiative to improve future learning activities, ensuring all participants successfully graduated.

details.subtitle: The Context
details.content: HR leadership needed a proactive approach to identify employees at high risk of leaving within the next two quarters.

details.subtitle: The Architecture
details.content: Built a predictive model using historical absence, tenure, and performance data processed through Pandas in Jupyter Notebooks.

details.subtitle: The Outcome
details.content: Successfully flagged 85% of at-risk employees, allowing HR to intervene with targeted retention strategies.

title: Automated File Decryption Pipeline
summary: Engineered a Python script to bypass department file encryption by automating the extraction and resaving process of secure documents.

details.subtitle: The Context
details.content: Daily reports were locked behind tedious manual decryption workflows that cost the team hours every week.

details.subtitle: The Architecture
details.content: Engineered a secure, locally-run Python automation script to handle bulk file processing and output clean data.

details.subtitle: The Outcome
details.content: Reduced daily processing time from 2 hours to 45 seconds.

title: Management Dashboard
summary: Consolidated HR, GA, Labour, and Accounting data into a single source of truth Metabase dashboard, ensuring complex metrics are digestible.

details.subtitle: The Context
details.content: Leadership lacked a unified view of workforce and financial health, relying on scattered Excel reports.

details.subtitle: The Architecture
details.content: Designed a centralized SQL database layer feeding directly into a live, interactive Metabase instance.

details.subtitle: The Outcome
details.content: Achieved a single source of truth, standardizing KPIs across 4 different departments.

title: Dynamic QR Code Generator
summary: Built a Python-based utility to generate custom QR codes, featuring automated logo embedding and background removal.

details.subtitle: The Context
details.content: Marketing needed hundreds of custom, trackable QR codes with specific brand logos embedded.

details.subtitle: The Architecture
details.content: Utilized Python image processing libraries to automate transparency generation and batch rendering.

details.subtitle: The Outcome
details.content: Deployed an internal tool that generates 500+ print-ready QR codes in under a minute.

title: Employees Absence Prediction
summary: Using Python, Pandas, and XGBoost with EWMA lag features to predict employee absences for April 2026, assisting leadership in proactive workforce planning.

details.subtitle: The Architecture
details.content: Engineered a robust time-series pipeline using Pandas to build Exponentially Weighted Moving Average (EWMA) lag features, feeding into an optimized XGBoost regressor. The model captured complex seasonal sickness trends.

details.subtitle: Macro Prediction
details.content: The model successfully forecasted overall headcount absences across all 8 manufacturing departments with high accuracy on the out-of-time holdout data.

details.subtitle: Micro Prediction
details.content: Further granular analysis allowed the system to predict specific illness volumes (e.g., Dyspepsia, Typhoid) to assist the onsite medical clinic with inventory planning.

title: Absence Dashboard for HoD
summary: Designed a Metabase dashboard for HoD to track their employees' absence, ensuring timely decision-making.

details.subtitle: The Context
details.content: Heads of Departments needed real-time visibility into their specific team's attendance metrics.

details.subtitle: The Architecture
details.content: Built role-based access control (RBAC) SQL views feeding into a localized Metabase reporting structure.

details.subtitle: The Outcome
details.content: Eliminated the daily HR attendance email blast, replacing it with a live self-service portal.

title: This Website
summary: Yes, I made this website using Next.js, Framer Motion, and Tailwind CSS to compile all my projects into one place.

details.subtitle: The Context
details.content: Standard CVs and portfolios lack the visceral, interactive depth necessary to truly showcase a technical skillset.

details.subtitle: The Architecture
details.content: Engineered a Next.js frontend with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion for extreme Cyberpunk 2077 aesthetics.

details.subtitle: The Outcome
details.content: A high-performance, responsive digital terminal that serves as both a portfolio and a technical demonstration.
